title: DEFECT RENDER: missed interrupt at 8 kHz, degraded telephony line (must FAIL)
why_it_matters: DEFECT RENDER. The same missed-interrupt shape as gld-8k-missed, re-rendered through the identical degraded telephony line. Proves codec degradation does not mask a real miss: the FAIL verdict is stable too.

telephony_degradation.note: Post-processed by corpus/classes/telephony_codec.py (degrade_telephony) after the standard deterministic render, applied identically to both channels.
